mapper.sql: id, dict_code, dict_label, dict_value, tag_type, description, status, sort, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_dict_data WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_dict_data WHERE dict_code = #{dictCode} AND dict_value = #{dictValue} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_dict_data (dict_code, dict_label, dict_value, tag_type, description, status, sort) VALUES (#{dictCode}, #{dictLabel}, #{dictValue}, #{tagType}, #{description}, #{status}, #{sort})
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_dict_data
dict_code = #{dictCode}, dict_label = #{dictLabel}, dict_value = #{dictValue}, tag_type = #{tagType}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, sort = #{sort}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_dict_data SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_dict_data SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_dict_data SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE dict_code = #{dictCode} AND deleted = 0
